items.title: OpenAI says GPT-5.4 produces presentations with stronger, more varied aesthetics and makes more effective use of its image generation tools (Igor Bonifacic/Engadget)
items.title_en: OpenAI says GPT-5.4 produces presentations with stronger, more varied aesthetics and makes more effective use of its image generation tools (Igor Bonifacic/Engadget)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 表示，GPT-5.4 生成的演示文稿具有更强、更多样化的美感，并更有效地利用其图像生成工具（Igor Bonifacic/Engadget）

items.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4, saying it is its "most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work" and its first with native computer use capabilities (Emma Roth/The Verge)
items.title_en: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4, saying it is its "most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work" and its first with native computer use capabilities (Emma Roth/The Verge)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4，称其是“专业工作中最有能力、最高效的前沿模型”，也是第一个具有本机计算机使用功能的模型（Emma Roth/The Verge）
